heroTip: 日本仍是现金社会 — 出行时需携带日元现金，同时备好信用卡。
bestPaymentMethod: 日元现金 + 低手续费信用卡
bestCard: 选择海外使用手续费较低的信用卡。Wise 或 Revolut 等无手续费卡也是很好的选择。
topTips: 可在日本邮政银行或 7-Eleven（7Bank）的 ATM 取款，支持外国卡。
日本许多小商店只收现金。
便利店（罗森、全家）通常支持 IC 卡 — Suica 卡可使用。
在百货公司、大型餐厅和酒店可使用信用卡。
在同一家店购物满 ¥5,000 可申请 10% 消费税退税。
avoidTip: 避免在机场兑换货币 — 汇率远差于市区 ATM 或银行。
dccNote: 在日本刷卡时，请始终选择以日元（JPY）结算。即使商家提出其他货币选项也应拒绝。

fxFeeItems.name: 外汇手续费（境外交易费）
fxFeeItems.detail: 您的银行对海外刷卡收取的费用 — 通常为交易金额的 1.5%–2.5%。

fxFeeItems.name: 汇率差价
fxFeeItems.detail: 中间市场汇率与银行实际提供汇率之间的差距 — 通常为 0.5%–2%。

fxFeeItems.name: ATM 手续费
fxFeeItems.detail: 来自您的本国银行和当地 ATM 的取款费用 — 合计每次可达 30–50 元。

fxFeeItems.name: DCC 加价
fxFeeItems.detail: 以本国货币付款时的额外加价 — 通常比真实市场汇率高 3%–10%。

attractions.name: Senso-ji Temple
attractions.detail: Tokyo's oldest Buddhist temple with a stunning five-story pagoda and Nakamise shopping street lined with traditional crafts and snacks.
attractions.tip: Carry cash JPY for souvenir stalls — most vendors along the temple approach are cash-only.

attractions.name: teamLab Planets
attractions.detail: Immersive digital art museum in Toyosu with floor-to-ceiling interactive light installations and infinite mirror reflections.
attractions.tip: Book tickets online in advance — on-site ticket machines are JPY card payment only.

attractions.name: Fushimi Inari Shrine
attractions.detail: Iconic path of thousands of vermillion torii gates winding up the mountain behind Kyoto's most famous fox shrine.
attractions.tip: Carry small JPY coins for street food and souvenir stalls at the mountain base.

attractions.name: Tokyo Skytree
attractions.detail: World's second-tallest tower at 634m — panoramic views of the city and Mt. Fuji on clear days.
attractions.tip: Cards accepted at the ticket counter; carry JPY for cafes and gift shops inside.

attractions.name: Universal Studios Japan
attractions.detail: World-class theme park with Super Nintendo World (Mario Kart), Harry Potter, and Minion Park.
attractions.tip: Buy tickets online before visiting — park entry and most on-site shops accept credit cards.
